TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Qolu, title = Qolu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qolu} }

S.FORM: Qolu Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Qolu a niyaro', 43 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 200 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 191 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 9 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal92%, Paiwan1%, Truku1%, roma3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *o~u…ĺo~u~u itiniaj i *iansńßi ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u *o~u…ĺo~u~u a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, paiwan*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Qolu Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Qolu a niyaro', 43 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 200 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 191 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 9 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal92%, Paiwan1%, Truku1%, roma3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *o~u…ĺo~u~u itiniaj i *iansńßi ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u *o~u…ĺo~u~u a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, paiwan*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~u °.
